item.title: Talk at CIRM Workshop in Marseille
item.description: I just presented our work on “Branch-and-Cut for Mixed-Integer Linear Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization” (jointly with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf) at the CIRM workshop “Optimization at the second level” in Marseille. You find the preprint of our paper here.
item.content: I just presented our work on “Branch-and-Cut for Mixed-Integer Linear Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization” (jointly with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf) at the CIRM workshop “Optimization at the second level” in Marseille. You find the preprint of our paper here.

item.title: New Preprint Available!
item.description: The preprint of our new paper “Branch-and-Cut for Mixed-Integer Linear Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization” (joint work with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf) is available right now and can be found here. The accompanying open-source implementations are available here.
item.content: The preprint of our new paper “Branch-and-Cut for Mixed-Integer Linear Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization” (joint work with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf) is available right now and can be found here. The accompanying open-source implementations are available here.

item.title: Preprint Update
item.description: Our preprint “A Computational Study for Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems” (joint work with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf) just got an update. You can find it here.
item.content: Our preprint “A Computational Study for Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems” (joint work with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf) just got an update. You can find it here.

item.title: Talk at EUROYoung 2025
item.description: The EUROYoung 2025 in Naples was a blast! I had the pleasure of presenting our ongoing work on “A Branch-and-Cut Approach for Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization Problems”. Great discussions, inspiring talks, and wonderful people all around!
item.content: The EUROYoung 2025 in Naples was a blast! I had the pleasure of presenting our ongoing work on “A Branch-and-Cut Approach for Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization Problems”. Great discussions, inspiring talks, and wonderful people all around!

item.title: Talk at ALOP 2025
item.description: Today, I gave a talk about “A Branch-and-Cut Approach for Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization Problems” at the International Workshop on Algorithmic Optimization in Trier.
item.content: Today, I gave a talk about “A Branch-and-Cut Approach for Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization Problems” at the International Workshop on Algorithmic Optimization in Trier.

item.title: Talk at OR2025
item.description: I gave a talk today about “A Branch-and-Cut Approach for Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization Problems” at the OR2025 Conference in Bielefeld.
item.content: I gave a talk today about “A Branch-and-Cut Approach for Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization Problems” at the OR2025 Conference in Bielefeld.

item.title: Preprint Update
item.description: There is a new version of our preprint on “Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems” (joint work with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf). You can find it here. The accompanying open-source implementations are still available here.
item.content: There is a new version of our preprint on “Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems” (joint work with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf). You can find it here. The accompanying open-source implementations are still available here.

item.title: Talk at EURO2025
item.description: Today, I gave a talk about “Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems” at the EURO2025 Conference in Leeds.
item.content: Today, I gave a talk about “Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems” at the EURO2025 Conference in Leeds.

item.title: New Preprint Available!
item.description: The preprint for our new paper “Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems” (joint work with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf) can be found here. The accompanying open-source implementations are available here.
item.content: The preprint for our new paper “Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems” (joint work with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf) can be found here. The accompanying open-source implementations are available here.

item.title: About
item.description:
Contact

Trier University
Department of Mathematics
Universitätsring 15
54296 Trier
0651 / 201 - 3452
stevens@uni-trier.de

Education

  • Master of Science in Mathematics (2024)
    Trier University, Germany
  • Bachelor of Science in Business Mathematics (2022)
    Trier University, Germany

Short CV

  • Since 07/2025: Vice president of the SIAM Student Chapter at Trier University
  • Since 10/2024: PhD Student Mathematical Optimization at Trier University
  • Since 10/2024: Research and Teaching Assistant at Trier University, Department of Mathematics, working group “Nonlinear Optimization” (Prof. Dr. Martin Schmidt)
  • 10/2024 - 12/2025: Member of the Steering Committee within the Research Training Group “Algorithmic Optimization” at Trier University
  • 10/2024 - 12/2025: Associate Member of the Research Training Group “Algorithmic Optimization” at Trier University
  • 09/2024: Master of Science in Mathematics, Trier University
  • 09/2022: Bachelor of Science in Business Mathematics, Trier University
  • 08/2015 - 09/2018: Banker at Kreissparkasse Rhein-Hunsrück
item.content:
Contact

Trier University
Department of Mathematics
Universitätsring 15
54296 Trier
0651 / 201 - 3452
stevens@uni-trier.de

Education

  • Master of Science in Mathematics (2024)
    Trier University, Germany
  • Bachelor of Science in Business Mathematics (2022)
    Trier University, Germany

Short CV

  • Since 07/2025: Vice president of the SIAM Student Chapter at Trier University
  • Since 10/2024: PhD Student Mathematical Optimization at Trier University
  • Since 10/2024: Research and Teaching Assistant at Trier University, Department of Mathematics, working group “Nonlinear Optimization” (Prof. Dr. Martin Schmidt)
  • 10/2024 - 12/2025: Member of the Steering Committee within the Research Training Group “Algorithmic Optimization” at Trier University
  • 10/2024 - 12/2025: Associate Member of the Research Training Group “Algorithmic Optimization” at Trier University
  • 09/2024: Master of Science in Mathematics, Trier University
  • 09/2022: Bachelor of Science in Business Mathematics, Trier University
  • 08/2015 - 09/2018: Banker at Kreissparkasse Rhein-Hunsrück

item.title: Publications
item.description:
Submitted Works and Preprints

  • Branch-and-Cut for Mixed-Integer Linear Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization
    Jointly with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf
    Preprint (03/2026): Optimization Online
    Accompanying open-source implementations: GitHub

  • A Computational Study for Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems
    Jointly with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf
    Preprint (02/2026): Optimization Online
    Accompanying open-source implementations: GitHub
item.content:
Submitted Works and Preprints

  • Branch-and-Cut for Mixed-Integer Linear Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization
    Jointly with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf
    Preprint (03/2026): Optimization Online
    Accompanying open-source implementations: GitHub

  • A Computational Study for Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems
    Jointly with Henri Lefebvre, Martin Schmidt and Johannes Thürauf
    Preprint (02/2026): Optimization Online
    Accompanying open-source implementations: GitHub

item.title: Talks
item.description:
• Never Change a Winning Team - Unless It’s More Fun
    Optimizing Tournament Narratives via Multi-Commodity Flow Models
    SIAM Student Chapter
    June 2, 2026, Trier University, Germany

  • Branch-and-Cut for Mixed-Integer Linear Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization
    CIRM Workshop “Optimization at the second level”
    March 18, 2026, Marseille, France

  • A Gentle and Incomplete Introduction to Branch and Cut with Intersection Cuts
    SIAM Student Chapter
    November 18, 2025, Trier University, Germany

  • A Branch-and-Cut Approach for Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization Problems
    EUROYoung 2025
    October 15, 2025, Naples, Italy
item.content:
• Never Change a Winning Team - Unless It’s More Fun
    Optimizing Tournament Narratives via Multi-Commodity Flow Models
    SIAM Student Chapter
    June 2, 2026, Trier University, Germany

  • Branch-and-Cut for Mixed-Integer Linear Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization
    CIRM Workshop “Optimization at the second level”

  • A Gentle and Incomplete Introduction to Branch and Cut with Intersection Cuts
    SIAM Student Chapter
    November 18, 2025, Trier University, Germany

  • A Branch-and-Cut Approach for Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization Problems
    EUROYoung 2025

    International Workshop on Algorithmic Optimization
    September 25, 2025, Trier, Germany

  • A Branch-and-Cut Approach for Decision-Dependent Robust Optimization Problems
    OR2025 Conference
    September 3, 2025, Bielefeld, Germany

  • Solving Decision-Dependent Robust Problems as Bilevel Optimization Problems
    EURO2025 Conference
    June 23, 2025, Leeds, UK

item.title: Teaching
item.description:
Exercise Classes Held in Recent Years

Summer Term 2026

  • Nonlinear Optimization
  • Bilevel Optimization II

Winter Term 2025/26

  • Bilevel Optimization I

Summer Term 2025

  • Numerical Optimization
  • Nonlinear Optimization

Winter Term 2024/25

  • Linear Optimization
item.content:
Exercise Classes Held in Recent Years

Summer Term 2026

  • Nonlinear Optimization
  • Bilevel Optimization II

Winter Term 2025/26

  • Bilevel Optimization I

Summer Term 2025

  • Nonlinear Optimization
